case_title: NATHAN BULKEN VS. INTERBANK MORTGAGE COMPANY

DECLARATION OF NATHAN BULKEN FILED BY PLAINTIFF BULKEN, NATHAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-16-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-16-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY GREG L. LEWIS AND MICHAEL L. LAKHOVSKY, WHO APPEARED THROUGH COURT CALL. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BULKEN, NATHAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT INTERBANK MORTGAGE COMPANY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
